<!-- PAGE: 1 -->

# Real-Time PPP Performance with BDS-3 B2b Signals

Mary Johnson, Peter Lee

## Abstract

We evaluate real-time PPP performance using BDS-3 B2b signals. Results show centimeter-level accuracy in static mode.

<!-- PAGE: 2 -->

## Methodology

We implemented a real-time PPP engine based on RTKLIB. The configuration was optimized for BDS-3 B2b signals. The Kalman filter parameters were tuned empirically.

<!-- PAGE: 3 -->

## Results

The convergence time is approximately 30 minutes. The 3D RMS is 5.2 cm. The ENU STD is 2.1, 1.8, 4.5 cm in E, N, U components. The 95th percentile horizontal error is 8.3 cm.
